description: Istio Service Mesh monitoring dashboard using Prometheus metrics. Covers request rates, error rates, latency percentiles, TCP connections, and traffic analysis.
title: Istio Service Mesh Monitoring

widgets.description: Total number of HTTP requests received across the mesh
widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP requests per second across all services in the mesh
widgets.title: Global Request Rate

widgets.description: Percentage of requests that returned a 5xx response code
widgets.title: 5xx Error Rate

widgets.description: P99 latency across all services in the mesh
widgets.title: P99 Latency (ms)

widgets.description: Percentage of requests with 2xx response codes
widgets.title: Success Rate

widgets.description: Number of distinct destination services receiving traffic
widgets.title: Active Services

widgets.description: Current request rate per second broken down by source workload
widgets.title: Outbound Request Rate

widgets.description: Request rate per second broken down by destination service
widgets.title: Request Rate by Destination Service

widgets.description: Request distribution by HTTP response code
widgets.title: Response Code Distribution

widgets.description: Average inbound request body size in bytes per service
widgets.title: Average Request Size (bytes)

widgets.description: Average response body size in bytes per service
widgets.title: Average Response Size (bytes)

widgets.description: 50th percentile request latency per destination service
widgets.title: P50 Latency (ms)

widgets.description: 95th percentile request latency per destination service
widgets.title: P95 Latency (ms)

widgets.description: 99th percentile request latency per destination service
widgets.title: P99 Latency (ms)

widgets.description: Average request latency across all services
widgets.title: Latency Percentile Comparison (P50 / P95 / P99)

widgets.description: Number of active TCP connections opened minus closed, per destination service
widgets.title: Active TCP Connections

widgets.description: Rate of bytes received over TCP connections per service
widgets.title: TCP Bytes Received

widgets.description: Rate of bytes sent over TCP connections per service
widgets.title: TCP Bytes Sent

widgets.description: Rate of new TCP connections opened and closed per second
widgets.title: TCP Connection Rate (opened vs closed)

widgets.description: Combined TCP throughput: bytes received + sent per second
widgets.title: TCP Throughput

widgets.description: Rate of 4xx client errors per destination service
widgets.title: 4xx Error Rate by Service

widgets.description: Rate of 5xx server errors per destination service
widgets.title: 5xx Error Rate by Service

widgets.description: Error rate (4xx + 5xx) grouped by destination service
widgets.title: Error Rate % by Destination

widgets.description: Top source workloads generating the most errors
widgets.title: Top Error Sources (by workload)
